scripts.predev: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const isWin=process.platform==='win32'; const cmd=isWin?'powershell':'bash'; const args=isWin?['-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','scripts/dev-clean.ps1']:['scripts/dev-clean.sh']; const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status ?? 0);"
